kernels.name: de440s.bsp
kernels.purpose: JPL planetary+lunar ephemeris for the Skyfield independent oracle (VALIDATION ONLY)
kernels.license: US Government work (NASA/JPL/Caltech) — public domain; freely redistributable

note: The kernel is never committed and never included in the Vercel/production bundle (next.config outputFileTracingIncludes references only swisseph). Checksum is enforced by python/kernel_manifest.py (raises on mismatch).
